reference_answer: Archivist Nora Pike received map case M-31.
LQ-31's initial status was pending condition review.
Conservator Ravi Sen was assigned to condition review.
Public display was denied because the hinge strip was brittle.
The condition note was corrected from brittle hinge strip to repaired hinge strip.
The approved display plan superseded the digitization-only plan.
The curator withdrew the request for open-table handling.
The current preservation status is display approved with handling restricted.
